title: Reinventing Entropy | Compression is Intelligence Part 1
summary: 3Blue1Brown presents the thesis that compression and intelligence are fundamentally linked by examining entropy through the lens of language compressibility. The video visualizes Shannon's information theory to explore how the compressibility of English text relates to information content and entropy, grounding the exploration in historical mathematical work.
